zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret of Dunbar於1102年出生在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾鄧巴時，她的父親Gospatric II40歲，母親Sybil Morel32歲。她於1118年與Philip de Montgomery在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾鄧巴結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1154年在蘇格蘭Forfarshire道格拉斯 安德 安格斯享年52歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret of Dunbar于1102年出生在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾鄧巴时，她的父亲Gospatric II40岁，母亲Sybil Morel32岁。她于1118年与Philip de Montgomery在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾鄧巴结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1154年在苏格兰Forfarshire道格拉斯 安德 安格斯享年52岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: possibly a metonymic occupational name for a fisherman, from orfe, a species of freshwater fish. Alternatively, a habitational name from Urff near Kassel, formerly Orpha.

nameMeanings.name: Dunbar
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Dunbar, a place on the North Sea coast near Edinburgh, named with Gaelic dùn ‘fort’ + barr ‘top, summit’.

History: A family of this name were granted the lands of Dunbar by Malcolm III (1058–1093), and later acquired the earldoms of Dunbar and March. These earldoms were then withdrawn from the family by James I in 1434.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret of Dunbar was born in 1102, in Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, her father, Gospatric II, was 40 and her mother, Sybil Morel, was 32. She married Philip de Montgomery in 1118, in Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died in 1154, in Douglas and Angus, Forfarshire, Scotland, at the age of 52, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret of Dunbar est née en 1102, à Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Écosse, son père, Gospatric II, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Sybil Morel, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Philip de Montgomery en 1118, à Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée en 1154, à Douglas and Angus, Forfarshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterrée à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret of Dunbar 1102 in Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gospatric II 40 und ihre Mutter Sybil Morel 32. Sie hat 1118 in Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland Philip de Montgomery geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb 1154 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Douglas and Angus, Forfarshire, Scotland und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret of Dunbar è nata il nel 1102 nel Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, sua padre, Gospatric II, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Sybil Morel, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato Philip de Montgomery nel 1118, nel Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1154, nel Douglas and Angus, Forfarshire, Scotland, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolta a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret of Dunbarが1102年にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアダンバーで生まれた時，父Gospatric IIは40歳，母Sybil Morelは32歳であった。1118年にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアダンバーでPhilip de Montgomeryと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1154年にスコットランドForfarshireドウグラス アンド アンガスで52歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret of Dunbar(이)가 1102년 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 던바에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gospatric II(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sybil Morel(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1118년 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 던바에서 Philip de Montgomery(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1154년 스컷랜드 Forfarshire 더글라스 앤드 앤구스에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret of Dunbar nasceu em 1102, em Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, seu pai, Gospatric II, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Sybil Morel, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com Philip de Montgomery em 1118, em Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1154, em Douglas and Angus, Forfarshire, Scotland, com 52 anos, e foi sepultada em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret of Dunbar родилась в 1102 г. в местности дунбар, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Gospatric II было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Sybil Morel, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Philip de Montgomery в 1118 г. в местности дунбар, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла в 1154 г. в местности доуглас анд ангус, Forfarshire, Шотландия в возрасте 52 лет и была похоронена в местности Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret of Dunbar nació en 1102, en Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, su papá, Gospatric II, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Sybil Morel, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Philip de Montgomery en 1118, en Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1154, en Douglas and Angus, Forfarshire, Scotland, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultada en Scotland.
